name: instanode dashboard login page
description: Browser monitor of the dashboard /app login page. A BROWSER (not SIMPLE) monitor because /app is a React SPA — a SIMPLE ping would pass on the empty index.html shell even if the JS bundle 404s (the stale-deploy chunk-404 failure mode). The browser monitor renders the page and fails if the SPA does not mount. A FAILED check means customers cannot log in.
